name: Barbecue Fish Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium heavy saucepan, sauté onion in oil over medium-high heat until tender.
2. Add catsup, water, lemon juice, sugar, Worcestershire sauce, prepared mustard, salt, and pepper to the saucepan.
3. Stir well to combine all ingredients.
4. Reduce heat to medium and simmer for 10-15 minutes.
5. Clean any mild fish (filleted or whole) in a wire basket that holds it firmly, or place a wire mesh on your grill.
6. Brush the fish with the seafood sauce occasionally until the fish is flaky.
7. This sauce is also excellent on shrimp.
8. If you're not happy with the freshness of your fish, soak it in milk for a few hours to remove the "fishy" smell.
